0111110110000010100 - ASI: 12

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0100 = 01 * 00
  0111 = 01 * 11
  11011 = 11 * 011
  010100 = 01 * 0100
  011111011 = 0111 * 11011
  0000010100 = 0000 * 010100
  0111110110000010100 = 011111011 * 0000010100
